name: feishu
description: Read Feishu profile, search Drive files, and inspect Docx content through the Anybox Feishu connector.

interface.shortDescription: Connect a Feishu custom app and expose user-authorized document tools.
interface.longDescription: A built-in plugin that uses the Anybox Feishu connector for custom-app OAuth, a local stdio MCP wrapper, and runtime token injection.

permissions: Read the connected Feishu user profile.
Search Feishu Drive files visible to the connected account.
Read plain text and structured block content from Feishu Docx documents.
Read Feishu Wiki space and node metadata.
Read cell values from Feishu spreadsheets.
Read records from Feishu Bitable tables.
connectorRequirements.reason: User-authorized Feishu access through the Anybox Feishu connector.
